title: Evento Vero 1
venueAddress: Av. Chapultepec Sur 180, Americana, Guadalajara, Jalisco
posterArtDirection: poster colorido para audiencias jovenes, con codigo qr de reservacion e imagen de un tiburon

narrative.manifesto: Una composicion amplia para empujar venta rapida, presencia de lineup y atmosfera celebratoria alrededor de live music / nightlife.

handoff.summary: Completed poster direction for Foro GDL using the paper-cut-stage template and paper-cut-collage-site renderer with a Festival Sunset shell ready for programmatic rendering.
developerNotes: Render the Festival Sunset system as the fixed page shell, not as ad-hoc per-component styling.
Keep the poster hierarchy focused on genre and preserve the title stack exactly as delivered by the designer.
Use Recortes organicos, Notas flotantes, Sellos de acceso only as supporting layers so the CTA, schedule, and venue facts stay readable.

assetPlan.query: Evento Vero 1 Live Music Nightlife live portrait
assetPlan.notes: Start from the venue-supplied hero whenever available and push it through duotone, masking, or collage treatment.

assetPlan.query: poster colorido para audiencias jovenes, con codigo qr de reservacion e imagen de un tiburon
assetPlan.notes: Designer can generate an editorial background plate or enhanced figure treatment when local uploads are not enough.

assetPlan.query: paper-cut-stage poster support graphics
assetPlan.notes: Renderer should assemble repeatable ornaments, textures, and badges from local assets rather than ad-hoc shapes.

title: Neo Jazz Azotea Session
summary: A rooftop jazz night with modern harmony, analog synth textures, and fast QR check-in.
description: Designed as a premium but lightweight public event page, this session showcases how venues can publish indexed event landing pages without heavy scripts.
venueAddress: Av. Chapultepec Sur 180, Americana, Guadalajara, Jalisco

narrative.manifesto: Una pieza editorial mas elegante para presentar jazz / neo soul con tension entre fotografia, tipografia y atmosfera nocturna.

handoff.summary: Completed poster direction for Foro GDL using the festival-ticket template and festival-ticket-site renderer with a Jazz Poster shell ready for programmatic rendering.
developerNotes: Render the Jazz Poster system as the fixed page shell, not as ad-hoc per-component styling.
Keep the poster hierarchy focused on genre and preserve the title stack exactly as delivered by the designer.
Use Constelacion de puntos, Lineas de onda, Sellos de acceso only as supporting layers so the CTA, schedule, and venue facts stay readable.
